data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Defenses against distributed denial of service attacks aimed at ensuring service availability.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Secure management of user identities and granular control over resource access.

data.description: Protection through network firewalls preventing unauthorized access to resources.

data.description: Data is encrypted both in transit and at rest ensuring confidentiality and integrity.
